source_name: Code4rena Kinetiq Findings and Analysis Report (2025-04) - Low Risk and Non-Critical Issues
issue_claim: Immutable defaultOracle Creates Single Point of Failure
why_it_looked_bad: The immutable defaultOracle address cannot be updated, creating a single point of failure if the oracle becomes compromised or unreliable.
why_not_valid: immutable oracle dependency is centralization/upgradeability risk rather than immediate exploit unless the oracle can fail or be compromised in scope
downgrade_reason: immutable oracle dependency is centralization/upgradeability risk rather than immediate exploit unless the oracle can fail or be compromised in scope
trust_assumption: Treat as a caution/false-positive reference unless the current target shows permissionless reachability, direct value loss, and concrete affected code path.
when_it_could_be_real: if combined with permissionless access, stale oracle data, or large unbounded sets
if protocol configuration makes this path critical to solvency or withdrawal availability
